utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: so we finally get to the top of the mountain and airhead here forgets the camera !

emotion_cause.span: 1_we finally get to the top of the mountain and airhead here forgets the camera !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , you know the same thing happened to me one time .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: When did that happen to you ? !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Do not you remember when we were jogging in the park and we saw that really pretty bird and wanted to take a picture ... I did not have my camera !

emotion_cause.span: 4_we saw that really pretty bird and wanted to take a picture ... I did not have my camera !

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Oh yeah . First of all , chasing the Churo guy is not jogging .

emotion_cause.span: 5_chasing the Churo guy is not jogging .

utterances.speaker: Krista
utterances.text: Oh , this is so good . You have got to try it .

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Oh , damn ! I got it on my pants .

utterances.speaker: Krista
utterances.text: We would better take these pants off upstairs or that stain gonna set .

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Yep . I am gonna wear these on our date tonight .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I do not believe they are brother and sister .
